mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for negligence if I got sick from toxic chemicals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually, no workers comp is your only option against an employer. However, you CAN sue a third party—like a chemical manufacturer or a mask maker—if their defective product caused your illness, which allows for pain and suffering damages.
